name: Reference Support Connector
description: Reference external-integration connector: registers Company Brain tools (search_tickets / get_ticket) that fetch structured 'ticket' data from a public read-only API (jsonplaceholder.typicode.com), demonstrating the tools + net:<host> + storage pattern end-to-end.
author: Naridon Inc. <plugins@notionless.example>

tools.description: Search support tickets by keyword and return matching tickets (id, title, body).
Fetch one support ticket by numeric id and return its full record.
